tags.description: Campsite and picnic area. Water available, but not potable due to manganese issues (2022). Registration at RV resort office. Pebble beach. Alternate kayak landing in estuary.
tags.name: Cluxewe Resort Campsite

tags.description: Moderate to steep cobble beach. Drift logs, kelp. Developed. Non-potable water at tap. Boat launch (high water only). Hiking trail to whale rubbing beach, viewing platform. Hydrophones.
tags.name: Bere Point Regional Park Campground

tags.description: Cobble beach. Exposed. Fairly steep. Kelp. Camp along beach.
tags.name: Graeme Point (BCMT)

tags.description: Cobble beach. Exposed. Fairly steep. Kelp. Camp along beach berm.
tags.name: Graeme Point north (BCMT)
